facials.name: Beautywell Signature Facial
facials.description: A fully customized facial tailored to your skin's needs. Double cleanse, exfoliation, extractions, facial massage, custom mask, and finishing serums — every step selected specifically for your skin type.

facials.name: HydraLux Infusion
facials.description: An intensely hydrating treatment using multi-layer hyaluronic application and a collagen mask for plumped, dewy, glass-skin results. The hero step: three layers of hyaluronic acid on freshly treated skin.

facials.name: The Liquid Facelift
facials.description: Our most luxurious anti-aging treatment. Microcurrent therapy sculpts and lifts facial contours while peptide and vitamin C serums restore firmness and radiance. Finished with a collagen mask for visibly tighter, glowing skin.

facials.name: Lumin LED Therapy
facials.description: Harnesses clinical-grade LED wavelengths paired with a calming enzyme treatment. Red light stimulates collagen, blue light targets acne bacteria, and near-infrared reduces inflammation deep within the skin.

waxing.name: Upper Lip Wax
waxing.description: Quick, precise removal for a smooth, clean finish.

waxing.name: Brow Shaping Wax
waxing.description: Custom shaping to frame your face — brows mapped, waxed, and tidied.

waxing.name: Lip + Brow Wax
waxing.description: Both services together at a combined rate.
